x-enumeration-literals.name: Simple
x-enumeration-literals.description: Calculation method by which interest is calculated on the original principal only. Accumulated interest from prior periods is not used in calculations for the following periods. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compounding
x-enumeration-literals.description: Calculation method by which interest is calculated each period on the original principal and all interest accumulated during past periods. (ISO20022)
